description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and gray surfaces, large windows, and a prominent garage at the front. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes landscaped green lawns and shrubs along the perimeter. The front facade is characterized by multiple large, rectangular windows and a main entrance adjacent to the garage. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with additional greenery and a patio area. A detached small structure, possibly a shed or utility room, is situated near the main building.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with large windows, a garage, and landscaped lawns enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, large windows, and front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, wooden fencing, and greenery along the side.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the backyard, patio area, and detached small structure.
description_view_3: Back view with a clear view of the backyard, rear windows, and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
